entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop being developed for improved yield and resistance to grain mold

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD
entities.description: A disease that deteriorates the physical and chemical quality of sorghum grains during the rainy season

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which sorghum is grown and susceptible to grain mold

entities.name: GRAIN SIZE
entities.description: A physical attribute of sorghum grain reduced by grain mold infection

entities.name: BLACKENING
entities.description: A physical discoloration of sorghum grain caused by grain mold

entities.name: GRAIN MOLD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum genotypes to resist infection by grain mold

entities.name: PEDIGREE BREEDING
entities.description: A traditional breeding method used globally to tackle the problem of grain mold

entities.name: POPULATION BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach used to develop genotypes resistant to grain mold and with good grain yield

entities.name: GENOTYPE × ENVIRONMENT INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The complex interaction between genetic makeup and environmental factors affecting trait stability

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the sorghum grain

entities.name: GGE BIPLOT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical tool used to analyze genotype and genotype-by-environment interaction for traits

entities.name: DHARWAD
entities.description: A test location identified as ideal for evaluating grain yield and grain mold resistance

entities.name: WHICH-WON-WHERE STUDY
entities.description: A study used to partition test locations into clusters based on trait performance

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: A trait that influences the grain yield of sorghum

entities.name: 100-GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: A trait that influences the grain yield of sorghum

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A trait that influences both grain yield and grain mold resistance

entities.name: GLUME COVERAGE
entities.description: A trait that influences grain mold resistance
